scripts.check-assets: node -e "import fs from 'fs'; import { songs } from './src/data/songs.js'; let missing = 0; songs.forEach(s => { if (s.image && !fs.existsSync('public/' + s.image)) { console.error('MISSING ASSET (Song ID ' + s.id + '):', s.image); missing++; } }); if (missing > 0) { console.error('❌ Build failed: ' + missing + ' assets are missing from public directory.'); process.exit(1); } console.log('✅ All song assets verified in public directory.');" --input-type=module
